(l) These rules may be called the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules 201~ , (2) They shall come into force on the date oftheir publication in the Official Gazette. 2. ~ t!1e And~a Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in rule 5, in sub-rule (3), the fo ll owina provIso shall be mserted, namely:- . 0 "Provided that the time allowed by the Registrar to rectify the defects shall not exceed thiny days."
